name: Garcinia Cambogia Extract
summary: Garcinia Cambogia Extract is tracked for Hydroxycitric acid inhibits ATP citrate lyase reducing lipogenesis with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
